title_en: 11年目で“覚醒”菊沢一樹 夏の新潟競馬“攻略法”は?
description: 日々トレセンや競馬場など現場で取材を続ける記者がテーマを考え、自由に書く東西リレーコラム「書く書くしかじか」。今週は美浦取材班の菊地一(24)が担当する。デビュー11年目の菊沢一樹(28)に「上半期の振り返り」「夏競馬の攻略法」を聞いた。 デビュー11年目の菊沢が飛躍の一年を送っている。4月の福島牝馬Sで7年ぶりの重賞制覇を飾ると、5月30日に通算200勝を達成。ここまで26勝をマークし、昨年更新したキャリアハイ...

description: 九州産限定の小倉未勝利勝ちリエーヴェ(牡＝松下)はひまわり賞(18日、小倉)。 福島新馬勝ちジーティーマイカ(牝＝前川)は中京2歳S(8月30日)。 阪神新馬勝ちクロリス(牝＝高橋一)は岩田康、函館未勝利勝ちの僚馬ダイシンドラゴン(牡)は丹内でともに函館2歳S(19日)へ。

description: 夏競馬の水曜企画は「夏色思い」。記者が夏に関するテーマを考え、深掘りする。第4回は大阪本社の坂田高浩(41)が担当。競馬開催に欠かせない馬運車にスポットを当て、今年の牡馬クラシック2冠を制したロブチェンやオークス馬ジュウリョクピエロを輸送した中野運送店を取材。河島幸一運転士(53)に競走馬のストレスを軽減して運ぶための工夫、輸送における暑熱対策などを聞いた。 競馬開催における潤滑油として、馬運車は東?..

description: 昨年の仏G2ギヨームドルナノ賞優勝、同G1凱旋門賞(16着)など海外を転戦してきたアロヒアリイ(牡4＝田中博)が11日の土曜函館メイン・五稜郭S(芝1800メートル)で国内戦に復帰する。当初予定していた巴賞は除外対象のため、自己条件に切り替えた。 7日、函館で愛馬を確認した田中博師は「前走(サウジアラビア・ネオムターフカップ7着)でも直線を向いた時は手応えがあったのに、右に力が逃げてゴール。左右のバランスの悪さを?..

title_en: 【七夕賞】オニャンコポン使った効果期待 8日に函館で最終追い→福島へ移動
description: 函館で調教中のオニャンコポンは予定していた巴賞が賞金順で除外候補で、七夕賞に向かう。8日に函館で最終追いを行い、福島へ移動する。 小島師は「巴賞が出られないことも想定して、七夕賞も考えてはいました。函館記念(12着)はいい頃と比べるとひと息だったが、1度使うと良くなる馬なので…。七夕賞(3着)は昨年も頑張っているし、あとはどれだけ良くなってくるか。状態でしょう」と上積みに託した。

title_en: 【七夕賞】マイネルモーント 右の小回り歓迎 高木師「理想は中団前めで」
description: マイネルモーントはエプソムC12着からの反撃を期す。福島での勝利こそないが、25年中山金杯2着、26年中山記念4着と右回り＆小回りには実績あり。 高木師は「小回りコースはいい。年齢を重ねてズブくなっているのでブリンカーを着けていますが、最近はゲートがいまひとつ。この中間はゲート練習をしている。理想は中団前めで運んでほしい」と期待した。

title_en: 【七夕賞】カラマティアノス 条件好転を強調「コーナー4つのコースに替わるのはいい」
description: カラマティアノスはWコースでの1週前追いで、自己ベストに0秒2迫る5F65秒3の好時計をマークした。 杉木助手は「スイッチが入ってからも落ち着きがあって、直線でははじけるような走りだった」と動きを高評価。「決め手比べで少し分が悪い展開だった」と前走エプソムC6着を振り返った上で「理想は早めにふかしていく競馬なので、コーナー4つのコースに替わるのはいいと思う」と条件好転を強調した。

title_en: Three Stakes Winners Supplemented to F-T HORA Sale
description: Fasig-Tipton has cataloged an additional nine entries to its July Selected Horses of Racing Age Sale, which will be held July 14 in Lexington, including stakes winners Moonlight, Spirit of New York, and Victory Music.

title_en: Renaissance Lady Goes to Ace Stud at Tatts July Sale
description: Blue-blooded broodmare prospect Renaissance Lady lived up to her star billing by topping Day 1 of the Tattersalls July Sale July 7 at a cool 500,000 guineas. Godolphin sold 28 lots for gross receipts totaling 2,264,500 guineas.

title_en: Bayern, Breeders' Cup Classic Winner, Dies at 15
description: Bayern won the 2014 Breeders' Cup Classic (G1) and had been standing in South Korea at Great Hill Farm since 2022. He died July 5 because of complications from emergency hernia surgery.

title_en: Debut Winner Charlie's Cannon Added to Tatts July Sale
description: Exciting debut winner Charlie's Cannon is set for a swift return to the public arena when the son of New Bay is offered July 8 on Day 2 of the Tattersalls July Sale.

title_en: Exciting Lineup Assembled for Arqana's V2 Yearling Sale
description: The catalog for Arqana's V2 Yearling Sale was released July 7 and features 166 yearlings by leading sires such as Dark Angel, Havana Grey, Mehmas, Showcasing, and St Mark's Basilica.

title_en: Scarlett Begonia, Antivenom Blossom at Ellis Park
description: Two nicely bred juveniles became BloodHorse Maiden Watch qualifiers with comfortable debut victories at Ellis Park. Antivenom, a son of Candy Ride, broke his maiden July 4 before the Life Is Good filly Scarlett Begonia followed suit July 6.

title_en: Aug. 10 Fashionable Fillies Luncheon to Feature DeVaux
description: This year's Fashionable Fillies Luncheon will feature an exclusive interview with Kentucky Derby (G1) and Belmont Stakes (G1)-winning trainer Cherie DeVaux by broadcaster Donna Brothers.

title_en: Inaugural Becca Taylor Highlights Los Al September Meet
description: The first running of the $100,000 Becca Taylor Stakes will highlight the upcoming September Thoroughbred meet at Los Alamitos Race Course.

title_en: Tommy Jo, Iron Orchard Return in Victory Ride
description: Grade 1 winners Tommy Jo and Iron Orchard make their first starts since the Oct. 31 Breeders' Cup Juvenile Fillies (G1) in the $225,000 Victory Ride Stakes (G3) July 10 at Saratoga Race Course.

title_en: Magnitude Reigns Supreme in NTRA Poll
description: With a lack of major fixtures for older horses over the past week, Magnitude remained No. 1 in the National Thoroughbred Racing Association's Top Thoroughbred Poll released July 7.

title_en: BetMakers to Distribute Swedish Racing to Australia
description: BetMakers Technology Group announced it has been appointed by AB Trav och Galopp, Sweden's national horse racing betting organization, to distribute ATG's live racing content and data to wagering operators across Australia and New Zealand.

title_en: Bush Joins EquiTrack as Director of Strategic Projects
description: Marshall Bush has joined EquiTrack as the company's director of strategic projects, bringing a wealth of experience in strategic initiatives, relationship development, marketing, and capital markets to support the company's continued growth.

title_en: Englishman to Stud at Lane's End After Racing
description: The 3-year-old son of Maxfield recently won the Woody Stephens Stakes (G1) at Saratoga Race Course. He is expected to continue racing through 2027.

title_en: Dollars & Sense: Two Sets of Numbers, Different Stories
description: Dollars & Sense with Frank Angst looks at some more encouraging wagering numbers from NYRA at a time that overall handle continues to slide.

title_en: Greatest Joy is First Winner for Greatest Honour
description: The Divine Light Healing Ministries homebred filly wins her racing debut July 6 with trainer Kevin Rice at Presque Isle Downs by 1 1/4 lengths.

title_en: Our Moneyman Seeks to Continue Mr. Money's Winning Ways
description: Owner Chester Thomas and trainer Bret Calhoun bring Our Moneyman to the July 11 Indiana Derby (G3) at Horseshoe Indianapolis, a son of their 2019 winner Mr. Money.

title_en: BH Monday: Mid-Season Awards with Steve Kornacki
description: On the July 6 episode of BloodHorse Monday: Co-hosts Louie Rabaut and Sean Collins, and NBC's Steve Kornacki award the best horses and humans of the first half of the 2026 racing season.

title_en: Sky Sports Buying ITV's TV, Streaming Services
description: Sky and ITV believe the deal, which is subject to regulatory approval, will make them more competitive against big streaming giants such as Netflix, Disney, and Amazon.

title_en: Researcher O'Casaigh Buys 90% Interest in Early Voting
description: Dr. Padraig O'Casaigh announced July 6 he bought the majority interest in Early Voting. He said proceeds from the stallion's stud fees will be used to provide financial assistance to veterinary school students.

title_en: Veteran Turf Writer Rampellini Dies at 53
description: Mary Rampellini grew up in the racing business and worked 24 years for Daily Racing Form. She died July 4 in a hospital in Grapevine, Texas.

title_en: Amplify Partners with Museum of Racing for Summer Camp
description: The National Museum of Racing and Hall of Fame and Amplify Horse Racing are once again partnering for the Winner's Circle Summer Camp, an immersive four-day experience introducing high school students to the thrilling world of Thoroughbred racing.

title_en: Szumski Appointed as Tattersalls Polish Representative
description: Tattersalls Ireland has appointed Tomasz Szumski as its official representative in Poland. The announcement comes on the back of Time For The Star winning the July 5 Polish Derby as a €22,000 purchase by Szumski and trainer Adam Wyrzyk.

title_en: Purses Edge Up Despite Continued Handle Decline
description: Pari-mutuel handle on United States races for the first half of 2026 is down 4.52%, but purse numbers saw some improvement despite the wagering decline.

title_en: Prize Money Bolstered for Sussex Stakes
description: Bow Echo will compete for a bolstered prize at Goodwood this month after it was announced the Sussex Stakes (G1) will be run for a record £1.5 million, cementing it as Europe's most valuable mile race.

title_en: Stakes Recap: Belmont Derby & Belmont Oaks
description: Greg Wolf looks back at the Belmont Derby & Belmont Oaks at Saratoga this weekend.

title_en: Mi Bago, Zulu Kingdom Dead Heat for Kelso Stakes Win
description: The 2-1 favorite Zulu Kingdom engaged in a thrilling stretch duel with pacesetter Mi Bago, ultimately catching him at the wire for a dead-heat win in the 1-mile Kelso Stakes (G3T) July 5 at Saratoga Race Course.

title_en: Europeans Dominate The Spa's July 4 Grade 1 Contests
description: European shippers swept Saturday's Grade 1 events at Saratoga Race Course with Title Role taking the $750,000 Belmont Derby and Kensington Lane dominating the $600,000 Belmont Oaks.

title_en: Sweet Azteca Grabs Third Consecutive Great Lady M
description: Though she didn't threaten her own track record of 1:14.32, set last year, Sweet Azteca dominated her rivals in the Great Lady M Stakes (G2) July 4 at Los Alamitos Race Course.

title_en: Phileas Fogg Dominant in Suburban Repeat
description: The Gustavo Rodriguez-trained Phileas Fogg storms to a dominant wire-to-wire victory in the Suburban Stakes (G2) July 4 at Saratoga Race Course, defeating 2025 Dubai World Cup (G1) winner Hit Show and 2025 Louisiana Derby (G2) winner Tiztastic.

description: Title Role held on by the slimmest of margins to win the Belmont Derby (G1T) July 4 at Saratoga Race Course over West End Kid for trainers Simon and Ed Crisford.

description: Kensington Lane, acquired this spring with the hope that she could become a group/grade 1 winner, makes good on those expectations by upsetting the $600,000 Belmont Oaks (G1T) July 4 at Saratoga.

description: Trainer Steve Asmussen sees some similarities between Booked and the 2-year-old colt's sire Yaupon.

title_en: Retired Trainer Parisella Dies at Age 85
description: John Parisella, a colorful horseman who trained winners over 47 consecutive years during a career that produced 1,241 victories, dies at age 85.

title_en: Harper's Corner Takes Schuylerville in Spa Opener
description: Good fortune was in order on this tumultuous Friday at Saratoga Race Course.

description: Will Stroud has made great strides as a horse owner, and he will be hoping to secure a grade 1 double July 4 at Saratoga with Title Role in the $750,000 Belmont Derby (G1T) and Kensington Lane in the $600,000 Belmont Oaks (G1T).

title_en: Field of Gold Retired, to Stand at Juddmonte in 2027
description: Field of Gold, Europe's champion 3-year-old miler, has been retired from racing as of July 5 and will begin a new chapter at stud with Juddmonte in 2027.

description: The pedigree match is not unimportant, but numerous examples exist of a clever pedigree pattern upgrading a modest commercial background. Recent graded stakes winners Miss Vyvyanne and Lagynos are good examples.
